title: [worker] Prove one end-to-end external PR repair
objective: Prove: Select one external failing FlexNetOS PR with no existing owner lane, run the generated worker assignment for real, patch only the intended scope if a real fix is needed, commit, push, update the PR, watch CI, merge/automerge when green, and store the repeated/root-cause signature in ICM.
acceptance_criteria: Selected PR has current GitHub evidence, no owner-lane collision, and a recorded classification before editing.
A repair lane exists with metadata linking repo, PR, classification, owner, state, and TTL.
Worker performs narrow reproducer/log inspection before editing and records root cause.
Any code/config fix is committed and pushed immediately; PR body/comment is updated with root cause and validation.
Required CI is green and PR is merged/automerge armed, or a blocker is recorded with exact evidence.
ICM stores a useful error-resolved or context memory for the repair signature.
